headline: Hospitality Ventures Management Group (HVMG) Expands Renovation and Development Services Under Elevate

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $383
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Daniel Politzer   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $356 to $383.
